hook.name: CabalcoinHook
hook.description: Charges a fixed fee (initially 3%, reducible by the Cabalcoin owner) on each swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta, converting non-ETH fees to ETH through an internal nested swap. Gates pool initialization and liquidity addition to a controlled loadingLiquidity phase enforced by the Cabalcoin token contract; afterSwap also requires the caller to implement IValidRouter.
